prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `79cce52d`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_79cce52d`. The rule is: take the 6x6 interior, shift it cyclically downward by `(left-frame-2 row) - 1` and rightward by `(top-frame-2 col) - 1`, and drop the frame. The verifier does that directly in RE-ARC style in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79cce52d/verifier.py#L4), and the generator builds a six-region connected 6x6 mosaic with the official interior palette, then places the `7/6/2` frame and derives the shifted output in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79cce52d/generator.py#L21).

I used the Opus hint and rejected the Sonnet hint; that mismatch is recorded in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79cce52d/notes.md#L1). No new primitive was needed. Package files are [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79cce52d/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79cce52d/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79cce52d/generator.py), and [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_79cce52d/notes.md).

Validation passed:
- Official examples: `4/4` via `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 79cce52d`
- Generated examples: `1000/1000` via `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 79cce52d`
- Artifacts produced: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/79cce52d/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/79cce52d/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/79cce52d/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/79cce52d/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/79cce52d/previews/preview_03.png)

I also opened [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/79cce52d/previews/preview_01.png) and the generated family looks on-distribution: a framed 7x7 input with one top `2`, one left `2`, and a dense six-blob interior whose output is the wrapped shift.
